message:
fix(scripts): correct drop-off rate calculation for funnel gaps

The drop-off rate was incorrectly calculated based on array indices,
not step numbers. This caused issues when steps had gaps (e.g., step 4
missing data meant step 5's dropoff was calculated from step 3).

- Move dropoff calculation to printFunnelChart for correct sequential logic
- Remove dropoffRate from FunnelStep interface (now calculated at display)
- Add note about unused completed_count dimension in configure-ga4.ts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -59,6 +59,8 @@ const CUSTOM_DIMENSIONS = [
   // Progress tracking
   { name: 'completion_percentage', scope: 'EVENT', description: 'Progress through funnel (0-100%)' },
   { name: 'max_step_reached', scope: 'EVENT', description: 'Highest step/lesson reached in session' },
+  // NOTE: completed_count is registered but not currently used in analytics.ts
+  // Consider using completed_steps_count instead, or add events that send this parameter
   { name: 'completed_count', scope: 'EVENT', description: 'Number of steps/lessons completed' },
